title: Global Coronavirus Update
summary:
Main
The dry bulk spot market continues to strengthen. Iron ore spot cargo volume was not particularly strong last week, but capesize vessel availability has tightened further and helped lead to the jump in capesize rates. Brazil's coronavirus outbreak remains concerning, though, and represents one of the largest unknowns that could ultimately negatively affect the market.
